chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P. No. D-6042 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE HEARING OF CASE. 1. FOR ORDERS ON OFFICE OBJECTIONS. 2. FOR HEARING OF MAIN CASE. 27.08.2025 Mr. Maroof Hussain Hashmi, Advocate for the Petitioner. Ms. Zahrah Sehr Vayani, Assistant Attorney General for Pakistan. Mr. Abdul Samad Khan, Advocate for NADRA. --------------------- Objections of Respondent Nos.2 to 4/.NADRA, already available on record, wherein, it is mentioned that the Petitioner was directed to approach the Zone for Board proceedings for clearance of her CNIC and learned counsel for the NADRA also submits that the said office is situated at Incharge Verification and Revocation Branch, 1st Floor, Awami Markaz, Karachi. Learned counsel for the Petitioner under instructions does not press the instant Petition and will approach the above Office for redressal of her grievance, therefore, the same is dismissed as not pressed. The Incharge Verification and Revocation Branch of NADRA, 1st Floor, Awami Markaz, Karachi is directed to decide the case of Petitioner within one month as soon as she approaches. JUDGE JUDGE Jamil
